description: A watercolor cityscape of Leningrad (St. Petersburg) showing the Neva River in the foreground with small boats. A bridge spans the river in the middle ground. Behind it, the city skyline features a prominent blue-and-gold domed cathedral, various colored buildings, and rooftops. The sky is grey and overcast. The palette is muted with touches of turquoise water, red roofs, and the golden dome.
